channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.description:

- Trump urges Iran to make a deal or US will 'keep blowing them away'
- Trump says Iran ‘begging’ for deal to end war as Tehran issues new demands
- Trump urges Iran to negotiate end to war or face further assassinations
- Trump says he rejected Iran offer to be supreme leader
- Trump denies being 'desperate' for Iran deal
- ‘Lousy fighters, great negotiators’: Trump claims Iran ‘begging to make a deal’ with the US
- Trump says Iran ‘lousy fighters but great negotiators’
- Trump threatens Iran to make a deal or the U.S. will “keep blowing them away”

- Trump tells Iran to engage in talks ‘before its too late’

- Trump urges Iran to make a deal or US will ‘keep blowing them away’
- Iran Is Not Denying Negotiations. It Is Designing Them

- Trump urges Iran to make a deal or US will 'keep blowing them away'

- Iran says it is reviewing a US ceasefire plan but no talks; Trump says Tehran leaders want a deal
- Trump claims Iranians wanted him as Supreme Leader. His reply: ‘No, thank you’
- Donald Trump claims Iran seeks deal, Abbas Araghchi rejects negotiations
- Trump insists Iran 'badly' wants deal with the US after Tehran dismisses his ceasefire proposal
- Trump Says Iranian Leaders Are ‘Negotiating, Want to Make a Deal So Badly’

- Iran says it is reviewing a US ceasefire plan but no talks; Trump says Tehran leaders want a deal
